   "reasoning": "I'm exhausted and my students are suffering - we need real help, not just paperwork. Hiring more staff and reducing class sizes is the only way I see to actually make a difference, so I'm pushing hard for that. Bonuses and scholarships are nice, but they're just band-aids if we don't address the root issue of overcrowding and burnout. I've got 52 kids in my class and I can barely keep up - something has to give.",
